sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111610" key="filoyi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλ-οψία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n111610.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fondness for dainties,</tr_> esp. <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fish,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.730b</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">750d</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
